summary: stable EXP for editing Barry's specific PhD Paper 1 AAAJ Word draft from scratch using its source template context.

preference_sources: Barry's draft writing and formatting style

training_materials.note: Copied from Barry's OneDrive desktop paper draft folder on 2026-04-30.

scope_limits: This EXP is stable only for Barry's specific PhD Paper 1 AAAJ-style draft and close edits derived from it.
Do not assume it applies to other journals, later templates, or different supervisor preferences without new training materials.
Exact reconstruction requires preserving the source template context and validating rendered pages.
